message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000

participant "客户端" as Client
participant "AMS" as AMS
participant "UserControl" as UserControl

Client -> AMS: registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)
note right of Client: 注册回调接口
AMS -> UserControl: registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)
Client -> AMS: switchUser()
AMS -> UserControl: startUser()
note right of AMS: 执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG
UserControl -> UserControl: dispatchUserSwitch
UserControl -> Client: IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitching(newUserId, callback)
note right of Client: 通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS
Client --> AMS: IRemoteCallback.sendResult()
note right of AMS: 等待所有客户端处理完成之后继续进行切换用户的工作
UserControl -> UserControl: continueUserSwitch()
note right of UserControl: 结束冻屏，并停止在后台的访客用户
UserControl -> UserControl: dispatchUserSwitchComplete()
note right of UserControl: 通过回调方法通知客户端进行用户切换的收尾工作
UserControl -> Client: IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitchComplete(userId)

@enduml
